This site uses Just the Docs, a documentation theme for Jekyll.

My programming interests:

I like erlang and lisp. I have experience with Microsoft’s .NET (C# and VB).

I use Unix like systems on all my side projects. I program on emacs and love to be pragmatic about the environment and software. I am a big believer in automating software building processes.

Relevant experience

2020-current: Computer Science teacher at secondary schools.

2017-2020: Technical software developer of CAD-CAE programs at Batz S.COOP.

2007-2017: Programed multiple personal projects in Erlang. Contributed code to Mochiweb. ASP.NET programmer and consultant.

Relevant Studies

1999-2005 Enginering in computer science in the University of the Basque Country. Last year erasmus program in The university of Manchester
